reviews.review_description:
My wife is a wheelchair user so is unable to play the game so I was wondering if you could put a height adjuster in the game so you can still reach the board in a seated position thank you 

Update- she just tried it and she’s still a little bit too short so would it be possible to add another height adjuster position?
Thank you
I loved this as a kid and to play it now, is awesome.  Really fun and creative.

I remember waking up on Christmas morning and seeing several boxes but the first one I opened was a lite Brite.  I used it everyday to make complex designs like I was an artist, but I also used to lay my head on it for a couple of minutes so it would seem as 9f I was sick so I would stay home from school.overall great game
NO MESS OR MISSING PIECES! Underrated. Good way to do some structured but free lance art.

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing.  We are so glad you are enjoying the game.
